task_updates.executor_notes: Added `defaultTool: { toolId: string }` to `UISettings`, implemented `decodeDefaultTool()`, and routed `normalizeUserUISetting()` through the new branch. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit`, targeted eslint, and `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useUserUIState.test.ts`.

Changed `videoEditorSettings.paneSection` to `'main'` in the tool manifest. Verified statically that `ToolsPane` derives its Main Tools list from `paneSection === 'main'`, so video-editor now lands in that section; typecheck and eslint both passed.

Created `src/shared/lib/tooling/toolEligibility.ts` and moved the existing `ToolsPane` visibility predicate into `isToolEligible()` without changing the character-animate/cloud gating behavior. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit`, targeted eslint, `git diff --check`, and the existing `useUserUIState` test module.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed in `src/shared/hooks/useUserUIState.ts` that `UISettings` now includes `defaultTool`, `decodeDefaultTool()` is defined alongside the other decoders, and `normalizeUserUISetting()` has a `case 'defaultTool'` branch delegating to it.

Confirmed `videoEditorSettings.paneSection` is `'main'` in `src/shared/lib/tooling/toolManifest.ts`. `ToolsPane` still partitions from `toolsUIManifest.filter((tool) => tool.paneSection === 'main')`, so video-editor now renders with Main Tools from that shared manifest wiring.

Confirmed `src/shared/lib/tooling/toolEligibility.ts` matches the previously inlined env/cloud predicate, including the character-animate special case, and `ToolsPane.isToolVisible` now delegates to `isToolEligible()`.
